title: Ports and Adapters (Hexagonal Architecture)
description: Master the Ports and Adapters pattern to define clear infrastructure interfaces ("Ports"). Implement concrete "Adapters" to isolate core domain logic from external dependencies like databases and APIs.
objectives: Master the Ports and Adapters pattern to define clear infrastructure interfaces ("Ports").
Implement concrete "Adapters" to isolate core domain logic from external dependencies like databases and APIs.
